turns.content:
I am the subagent gsd-code-fixer fixing Phase 14 full-suite failures.

## Kết quả

Fixed full-suite failures while preserving Phase 14 cleanup semantics.

## Root-cause clusters fixed

- Removed stale tests importing deleted modules:
  - `category-gates`
  - `category-gate-audit`
  - `steering-engine/injection-builder`
- Updated stale category-gate/queue/runtime-policy/dispatcher expectations to current Phase 14 semantics.
- Fixed plugin setup optional-client guard in `src/plugin.ts`.
- Updated event observer tests/mocks for current exports.
- Updated `execute-slash-command` tests to current TUI prompt pipeline.
- Updated delegate-task e2e expected status to current `dispatched` contract.
- Updated Phase 14 summary and added dated fix report.

## Files changed

- `src/plugin.ts`
- `tests/hooks/plugin-event-observers.test.ts`
- `tests/plugin/bootstrap-tools-registration.test.ts`
- `tests/lib/concurrency.test.ts`
- `tests/lib/coordination/delegation/dispatcher.test.ts`
- `tests/lib/runtime-policy.test.ts`
- `tests/tools/execute-slash-command.test.ts`
- `tests/tools/delegation/delegate-task-e2e.test.ts`
- Deleted stale tests:
  - `tests/lib/category-gates.test.ts`
  - `tests/lib/category-gate-audit.test.ts`
  - `tests/features/steering-engine/injection-builder.test.ts`
- `.planning/phases/14-wire-monitor-notification-into-delegationmanager-dispatch-cl/14-04-SUMMARY.md`
- `.planning/phases/14-wire-monitor-notification-into-delegationmanager-dispatch-cl/14-REVIEW-FIX-2026-05-19.md`
- `.planning/ROADMAP.md`

## Commits

- `0d51637f` — `fix(14): resolve full-suite stale delegation tests`
- `7d139721` — `docs(14): update roadmap plan count after full-suite fix`

## Verification

- `npm run typecheck` — PASS
- Phase 14 scoped gate — PASS  
  `Test Files 11 passed (11)`, `Tests 271 passed (271)`
- `npm test` — PASS  
  `Test Files 198 passed (198)`, `Tests 2384 passed | 2 skipped (2386)`

Note: Vitest still prints existing `vi.unmock("node:fs")` hoisting warnings in continuity/delegation-persistence tests, but no test failures remain.

## Remaining failures

None in automated gates. Live OpenCode TUI L1 evidence remains `BLOCKED / NOT PROVEN` and still needs human/operator UAT via the checklist.
